name: Whova Event Management API
what_it_does: Award-winning conference and event management platform with REST API — providing attendee engagement (agenda, networking, Q&A, polling), exhibitor management, and event analytics for in-person, hybrid, and virtual conferences and trade shows.
use_cases: Importing attendee data from registration systems via API for event setup
Querying attendee engagement metrics and session attendance for ROI reporting
Syncing speaker and session data from CRM to Whova event app
Exporting networking connection data post-event for CRM follow-up
Managing exhibitor profiles and lead retrieval data via API integration
not_for: Event ticketing and sales (Whova focuses on engagement, not ticketing)
Small informal meetups without conference-level management needs
Webinar-only events without in-person component (use Zoom Webinar)
best_when: An event organizer needs conference-level attendee engagement (networking, agenda, Q&A) with post-event analytics and API integration for registration system sync.
avoid_when: You primarily need ticketing/sales, are hosting small informal events, or need fully virtual webinar format.

auth.notes: API key from Whova event organizer portal. Bearer token auth. Event-scoped access — separate credentials per event. No OAuth2 or scope granularity. API documentation requires organizer account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; per-event or annual pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per event or annual license; contact sales (typically $1,000-$5,000/event)
pricing.notes: Per-event or annual pricing. US-based (San Diego). Founded 2013. Multiple Best Event App awards. Used at 50,000+ events. Strong conference and trade show focus. Integration with Eventbrite, Cvent for registration. Chinese-American founder team.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for attendees, sessions, speakers, and exhibitors. Event-scoped API keys. No webhooks — polling required. Documentation available in organizer portal. API less comprehensive than Bizzabo or Cvent. Primarily for data import/export rather than full event management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Attendee import idempotent by email. Session management idempotent by ID. Read operations idempotent. Engagement data queries idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Event-scoped API key — different credential per event
API primarily for data import — not full event management automation
No webhooks — post-event data export requires scheduled polling
Documentation requires organizer account login to access

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Event-scoped API keys limit blast radius. No OAuth2 or scope granularity. Attendee PII handled per GDPR standards. Standard SaaS security for event platform.
